metadata.title: Oxford English Primary 4 (Shanghai Edition)
metadata.subtitle: 牛津上海版小学英语四年级下册

unit1.name: Touch and feel
unit1.topic: 学习通过触觉描述物体的特征

sentences.english: Touch this. How does it feel?
sentences.chinese: 摸摸这个。它摸起来怎么样？

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Tom, close your eyes and touch this.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: OK, Mum. It feels soft. Is it a toy?

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: No, it's not. It's a pillow.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: A pillow! I like soft pillows.

exercises.question: 什么可以用来触摸东西？

unit2.name: Smell and taste
unit2.topic: 学习描述食物的气味和味道

lines.speaker: Shopkeeper
lines.text: What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Lily
lines.text: I'd like some strawberries, please.

lines.speaker: Shopkeeper
lines.text: Here you are. These are fresh.

lines.speaker: Lily
lines.text: Thank you. Do you have grapes?

lines.speaker: Shopkeeper
lines.text: Yes, the purple ones are sweet.

lines.speaker: Lily
lines.text: I'll take them. Thank you.

unit3.name: Look and see
unit3.topic: 学习描述一天中不同时间的景象

sentences.english: The sun rises in the morning.
The shadow is long at noon.
The bird flies high in the sky.
sentences.chinese: 鸟儿在天空中高高飞翔。

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: Look, Tom! The sun is rising.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: It's so beautiful, Dad.

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: At noon, the sun is high in the sky.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: And the shadow is short.

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: Yes, you're right.

unit4.name: Subjects
unit4.topic: 学习学校各个学科的名称

sentences.chinese: 你最喜欢的学科是什么？

sentences.english: I can draw in Art class.
sentences.chinese: 我可以在美术课上画画。

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: What subjects do you have, Ben?

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: I have Chinese, Maths, English, Science, PE and Music.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: That's six subjects. What's your favourite?

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: I like Science. What about you?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: I like Music and Art.

unit5.name: Sport
unit5.topic: 学习各种运动项目和表达爱好

sentences.english: Do you want to join our club?
sentences.chinese: 你想加入我们的俱乐部吗？
足球是我最喜欢的运动。

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: I'd like to join the football club.

lines.speaker: Coach
lines.text: Great! Do you like playing football?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Yes, I play football every weekend.

lines.speaker: Coach
lines.text: That's wonderful. Welcome to the club!

sentences.english: The city is beautiful at night.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Whose violin is this?

lines.speaker: Lucy
lines.text: It's mine, Miss Wang.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Can you play it?

lines.speaker: Lucy
lines.text: Yes, I can. I practice every day.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Wonderful! The music is beautiful.

unit7.name: My day
unit7.topic: 学习描述日常作息时间

sentences.english: I get up at seven o'clock.
I have breakfast at half past seven.
I go to school at eight o'clock.
I go home at four o'clock.
I go to bed at nine o'clock.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Tom, what time do you get up?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: I get up at seven o'clock.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: When do you go to school?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: I go to school at half past seven.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: What about lunch?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: I have lunch at twelve o'clock.

sentences.chinese: 星期日是我最喜欢的一天。

sentences.english: How many days are there in a week?
There are seven days in a week.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: What day is it today?

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: It's Friday.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Great! I love Fridays.

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Because we have Art and Music.

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: That's nice!

sentences.english: What do you want to be?
I want to be a doctor.
My father is a police officer.
A farmer works in the field.

dialogues.title: Dialogue 1: What do you want to be?

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Amy, what do you want to be?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: I want to be a doctor.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Because doctors help sick people.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: That's great! You can help many people.

sentences.english: I have a brother and a sister.
sentences.chinese: 我有一个哥哥和一个姐姐。

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Lucy, this is my family photo.

lines.speaker: Lucy
lines.text: Oh, how nice! Who is this?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: This is my father and this is my mother.

lines.speaker: Lucy
lines.text: Do you have any brothers or sisters?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Yes, I have a brother.

unit11.name: Feelings
unit11.topic: 学习表达身体和情绪感受

sentences.english: I'm tired. I want to sleep.
I'm hungry. Can I have some food?
sentences.chinese: 我饿了。我可以吃点东西吗？

sentences.english: I'm thirsty. I want some water.
I'm full. I can't eat any more.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Tom, how are you feeling?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: I'm tired, Mum.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Do you want to have a rest?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Yes, please. But I'm also thirsty.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Here, have some water.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Thank you, Mum.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Tom, what can you do?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: I can swim and run. What about you?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: I can dance and sing.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Can you draw?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Yes, I can. I like drawing.
